title: Create: Dimensions
description: A create addon for pocket dimensions
body: ![](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/66265f22-03c7-40e0-a3b1-d0bcad0e2e89) [![Support me on Ko-Fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/croakandroll---?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white&label=Support%20me%20on%20Ko-Fi&labelColor=72a4f2&color=72a4f2)](https://ko-fi.com/croakandroll) [![Latest Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/meeplabsdev/createdimensions?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=black&label=Latest%20Release&labelColor=72f2ae&color=72f2ae)](https://github.com/meeplabsdev/connectorlib-mod/releases/latest) A minecraft mod that adds a custom per-player, world-shared pocket dimension, which ties in very closely with the create mod ([forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), [fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)). > > > Pocket Dimension (Initial State) ### Items (Base Materials) - Dimensional Scrap > Mined as an ore from the end dimension - Noctium Ingot > > > Smelting / Blasting of Scrap - Noctium Chunk > > > Crafting from Ingot - Noctium Powder > > > Crafting from Chunk - Noctium Rod > > > Pressing of Chunk - Noctium Plate > > > Pressing of Ingot - Noctium Shard > > > Pressing of Plate ### Items (Ingredients) - Infused Orb > > > Dust, Chunk, Ender Pearl - Noctium Crystal > > > Shard, End Crystal - Gilded Lens > > > Glass, Chunk, Crystal, Shard ### Items (Products) - Mirror of Shadows > > > Rod, Pearl, Lens > > Can be linked to a dimensional gateway by shift + right clicking > When used it transports the player between the pocket dimension and their previous dimension > Only works when linked to a gateway with sufficient rotational speed - Forbidden Fruit > > > Lens, Chorus Fruit > > When eaten transports the player between the pocket dimension and the overworld > Applies the wither effect to the player when teleporting > Spawns the player within a 8192 block radius from 0,0 in the overworld ### Blocks - Noctium Casing > > > Apply Ingot onto any log - Noctium Composite > > > Dust, Glass - Dimensional Gateway > > > Ingot, Glass
